name_en: [Top-tier Original Box] Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. The new 1955 series reimagines the Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag, combining versatility with practicality. Crafted from classic beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, the zip closure and adjustable shoulder strap add depth to the design. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, gold-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail. Inside: 1 card slot, external pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (55cm high). Zip closure.
